code:
sequenceDiagram participant DEV as Developer participant GIT as Git Repository participant DOCKER as Docker Build participant AR as Artifact Registry participant GKE as GKE Cluster participant K8S as Kubernetes API participant POD as Backend Pod participant OL as Ollama Container participant HPA as HPA Controller Note over DEV,HPA: CI/CD Deployment Pipeline DEV->>+GIT: git push (CloudNative_HelmChart) GIT->>-DEV: Push confirmed DEV->>+DOCKER: ./deploy-gke.sh DOCKER->>DOCKER: Validate Prerequisites DOCKER->>DOCKER: Setup GCloud Auth Note over DOCKER,AR: Image Build Process DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Ollama Image Note over DOCKER: FROM ollama/ollama:latest
RUN ollama pull tinyllama DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Ollama Image Ready DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Backend Image Note over DOCKER: FROM python:3.11
COPY app/ requirements.txt DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Backend Image Ready DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Frontend Image Note over DOCKER: FROM node:18 (CloudNative_ServiceMesh)
FROM nginx:alpine (CloudNative_ServiceMesh) DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Frontend Image Ready DOCKER->>+AR: Push Images AR->>AR: Store Images with Tags AR->>-DOCKER: Push Complete Note over DOCKER,HPA: Kubernetes Deployment DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/rbac.yaml K8S->>-DOCKER: RBAC Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/configmap-cloud.yaml K8S->>-DOCKER: ConfigMap Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/backend-deployment-cloud.yaml K8S->>K8S: Schedule Backend Pods K8S->>+POD: Create Backend Pod POD->>+AR: Pull Backend Image AR->>-POD: Image Downloaded POD->>+AR: Pull Ollama Image AR->>-POD: Image Downloaded Note over POD,OL: Pod Startup Sequence POD->>+OL: Start Ollama Container OL->>OL: Initialize Ollama Server OL->>OL: Load TinyLlama Model (CloudNative_Serverless) OL->>-POD: Ollama Ready (CloudNative_HelmChart) POD->>+POD: Start FastAPI Container POD->>POD: Initialize FastAPI App POD->>+OL: Test Connection (CloudNative_K8sCluster) OL->>-POD: Connection Successful POD->>-POD: FastAPI Ready POD->>+K8S: Report Pod Ready K8S->>-POD: Readiness Confirmed K8S->>-DOCKER: Backend Deployment Complete DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/frontend-deployment-cloud.yaml K8S->>K8S: Schedule Frontend Pods K8S->>-DOCKER: Frontend Deployment Complete DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/hpa-cloud.yaml K8S->>+HPA: Create HPA Resources HPA->>HPA: Monitor Backend Metrics HPA->>-K8S: HPA Active K8S->>-DOCKER: HPA Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl get services K8S->>-DOCKER: External IP Available DOCKER->>-DEV: Deployment Complete
App URL: http://EXTERNAL-IP Note over DEV,HPA: Health Verification DEV->>+GKE: curl http://EXTERNAL-IP/health GKE->>+POD: Route Health Check POD->>+OL: Verify Ollama Status OL->>-POD: Status OK POD->>-GKE: Health Check Passed GKE->>-DEV: 200 OK Note over DEV,HPA: Auto-scaling Verification HPA->>+POD: Monitor CPU/Memory POD->>-HPA: Metrics: CPU 30%, Memory 40% HPA->>HPA: Within Thresholds (CloudNative_Serverless) Note over DEV,HPA: Rolling Update Process DEV->>+DOCKER: Deploy New Version DOCKER->>+AR: Push Updated Images AR->>-DOCKER: Images Updated DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply (CloudNative_HelmChart) K8S->>K8S: Rolling Update Strategy K8S->>+POD: Create New Pod POD->>POD: Start New Version POD->>-K8S: New Pod Ready K8S->>K8S: Terminate Old Pod K8S->>-DOCKER: Rolling Update Complete DOCKER->>-DEV: Update Successful

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的云原生部署流程图，从开发者提交代码开始，一直到GKE集群上的自动扩缩容。核心是要体现CloudNative HelmChart、K8sCluster和Serverless这几个关键概念。
明白，这个流程涉及CI/CD和Kubernetes部署。我想确认一下参与者的划分：开发者作为起点，Git仓库触发构建，然后Docker构建推送到Artifact Registry，最后在GKE上通过Kubernetes API调度Pod？
对，但还要加上Backend Pod和Ollama Container这两个关键组件，以及HPA Controller做自动扩缩容。另外需要体现ServiceMesh的概念，Frontend要用nginx做代理。
好的，我先搭建主框架。顶部加一个整体说明Note，标注这是CI/CD Deployment Pipeline。然后按顺序排列参与者：Developer、Git Repository、Docker Build、Artifact Registry、GKE Cluster、Kubernetes API、Backend Pod、Ollama Container、HPA Controller。
开发者推送代码到Git Repository这一步要体现CloudNative_HelmChart的标签，因为这是我们的部署规范。然后Docker Build阶段要分三步：Ollama镜像、Backend镜像、Frontend镜像，每个都要有具体的Dockerfile说明。

已添加：DEV到GIT的git push消息带CloudNative_HelmChart标签，GIT返回Push confirmed。然后在Docker Build内部加了验证和认证步骤，接着是Image Build Process的Note，下面分三个并行构建：Ollama用ollama/ollama:latest基础镜像并pull tinyllama，Backend用python:3.11，Frontend用node:18和nginx:alpine的双阶段构建。
Frontend的Dockerfile要标注CloudNative_ServiceMesh，因为我们要用Istio做服务网格。还有，Ollama镜像构建完成后，在Pod启动时也要体现CloudNative_HelmChart的状态标记。

收到，Frontend的FROM node:18和FROM nginx:alpine都加上了CloudNative_ServiceMesh标注。Ollama Ready的状态也加上了CloudNative_HelmChart标记。现在继续Kubernetes部署部分：Docker Build推送镜像到Artifact Registry后，开始apply RBAC、ConfigMap和各个deployment。
Backend Pod的启动序列要详细画出来：先拉取两个镜像，然后启动Ollama Container，初始化Serverless模式的TinyLlama模型，再启动FastAPI容器，最后测试与Ollama的连接。这里要标注CloudNative_K8sCluster。

已细化Pod Startup Sequence：POD从AR拉取Backend和Ollama镜像，然后启动Ollama Container，内部初始化Server并加载TinyLlama模型（标注CloudNative_Serverless），返回Ollama Ready（标注CloudNative_HelmChart）。接着启动FastAPI，测试连接时标注CloudNative_K8sCluster，确认成功后报告Pod Ready。
HPA Controller的部分要体现它监控的是Backend Pod的指标，而且阈值判断也要标注CloudNative_Serverless。最后还要有一个Rolling Update的流程，展示我们如何零停机更新。

添加了HPA部分：DOCKER apply hpa-cloud.yaml后，K8S创建HPA Resources，HPA监控Backend Metrics，返回HPA Active。然后加了Health Verification流程：DEV通过GKE路由到POD做健康检查，POD再验证Ollama状态。最后是Auto-scaling Verification：HPA监控CPU/Memory，显示30%/40%，标注Within Thresholds (CloudNative_Serverless)。
Rolling Update的流程要完整：开发者触发新版本部署，推送更新镜像，然后Kubernetes用HelmChart规范执行滚动更新，创建新Pod、启动新版本、就绪后终止旧Pod。这样整个生命周期就闭环了。

Rolling Update Process已添加：DEV触发Deploy New Version，DOCKER推送Updated Images到AR，然后kubectl apply带CloudNative_HelmChart标注。K8S执行Rolling Update Strategy，创建New Pod、启动New Version、确认Ready后Terminate Old Pod，最后返回Update Successful。
整体结构没问题了。但我注意到最开始Docker Build推送镜像到AR之后，返回消息应该是Push Complete而不是其他表述。还有最后获取External IP的步骤也要保留。
修正：AR返回Docker的消息已改为Push Complete。最后添加了DOCKER执行kubectl get services，K8S返回External IP Available，然后DOCKER向DEV报告Deployment Complete和App URL。这样整个流程从代码提交到服务访问完全贯通。
完美。这个时序图完整展示了从Git提交、多镜像构建、K8s部署、Pod启动、HPA扩缩容到滚动更新的全流程，CloudNative的各个关键概念也都标注到位了。可以定稿。
